values.name: Gradual Refinement
values.use_when: the idea keeps its identity while being clarified or sharpened.

values.name: Radical Transformation
values.use_when: the idea changes substantially in valence, function, or architecture.

values.name: Strategic Repurposing
values.use_when: the idea is reused for a different argumentative job.

values.name: Synthesis of Influences
values.use_when: the idea fuses multiple antecedents into a new composite.

values.name: Vocabulary Death / Concept Survival
values.use_when: the wording changes while the deeper concept survives.

values.name: Temporal Mutation
values.use_when: the idea mutates because the historical problem-space changes.
